acceptance_criteria: dispatch round-trips a packet via the stub backend in selftest
codex backend passes a live one-word smoke when codex CLI present, cleanly skips when absent
model/effort/backend swap without touching call sites
description: New tools/lib/workforce/{contract.mjs,codex.mjs,claude-cli.mjs,opencode.mjs}. contract.mjs exports dispatch(packet, {backend?, model?, effort?, schema?, readOnly?}) → {ok, output, tokensIn, tokensOut, raw} with retry/backoff and timeout; backend resolution: arg > SMA_WORKFORCE_BACKEND > 'codex'. codex.mjs wraps `codex exec` with the current flag set (split -m and -c model_reasoning_effort, --yolo for writers, -s read-only for reviewers, --output-schema when schema given); claude-cli.mjs wraps `claude -p --output-format json`; opencode.mjs is a documented stub returning not-configured. Selftest with a stub backend (no network).

evidence.output_tail: workforce contract selftest: ok (stub round-trip + retry + timeout)

title: tools/lib/workforce — pluggable executor backends
